title: Interface scope and array dereference issues

features.name: interface with parameter definition
features.description: Code should include an interface definition with a parameter, such as an interface with a PARAM integer parameter and a logic signal inside

features.name: interface array as module port
features.description: Code should include an interface array passed as a module port, where a parameterized interface array is declared in module port list

features.name: interface array access without index dereference
features.description: Code should include accessing interface array without index, where the array name is used directly with member access instead of using array indexing first
features.snippet:
localparam t1ap1 = pa.PARAM;
wire t1sp1 = pa.sig;

features.name: cross_module_interface_parameter_access
features.description: Code should include accessing interface array from outer scope where t1a is declared in top module but accessed from a submodule via t1a.PARAM syntax without proper instantiation context

features.name: interface array instantiation with index
features.description: Code should include proper interface array instantiation and correct indexed access to interface array elements for both parameters and signals
